name: Mercenary First Contract
effect: Unlocks Tier 1. Choose a spell and 4 faction upgrades from any faction matching your alignment.

name: Mercenary Second Contract
effect: Unlocks Tier 2. Holy Crusaders (Good): gain Crusader Assistants from spells cast + clicking power. Heresiarchs (Evil): boost Evil buildings by most-built. Trade Lords (Neutral): assistants find all FC types; Mana Regen from FC found.

name: Mercenary Third Contract
effect: Unlocks Tier 3 and a second spell slot from any faction.
